---
title: "LDCC Beginner Induction"
date: 2021-05-29
categories: []
image: https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/KQBlgzV0ma-xXgLosCCF6Ew1SJfFfNX1jJliBzqx2tE-768x576.jpg
---

- Distance: 2.4 km
- [Strava](https://www.strava.com/activities/5377300617)



![](https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/KQBlgzV0ma-xXgLosCCF6Ew1SJfFfNX1jJliBzqx2tE-768x576.jpg)
